chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1936 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 16.12.2025 M/s Toufeeque Hussain Noonari and Khaliq-ur-Rehman Kamboh, Advocates for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Dr. Nadeem Memon, Focal Person, DHO, Naushahro Feroze on behalf of Director General, Health Services Sindh, Hyderabad and Dr. Lutufullah Memon, Medical Superintendent, RHC, Mehrabpur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Additional AG files statements / comments on behalf of Respondents 1, 5 and 6, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioner. Dr. Nadeem Memon, Focal Person present in Court on behalf of Respondent No.1 / Secretary Health Department, Government of Sindh submits that the efforts for up-gradation of the Rural Health Center (RHC) Mehrabpur are underway and scheme in respect of up-gradation of RHC Mehrabpur will be approved in the next ADP Schemes. However, at this time the medicines are being provided to the patients in the RHC Mehrabpur and the rehabilitation of the RHC is expected to be started within 15 days. Under these circumstances, the petition is disposed of by directing Respondent No. 1 / Secretary Health Department, Government of Sindh to look into the matter personally and ensure that the Rural Health Center (RHC) Merhabpur is up-graded and rehabilitation work is completed within six months. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
